ddls:
CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the component */,
  "component_type" TEXT /* Type of the component (e.g., transistor, diode, resistor) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manufacturer */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the component was added to the database */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the component (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "spec_sheet_url" TEXT /* URL to the component's specification sheet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_components_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "control_bits" (
  "control_bit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each control bit */,
  "control_bit_value" INTEGER /* Value of the control bit (D6-D10) */,
  "vds_value" REAL /* Corresponding Vds value */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the control bit */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the control bit entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("control_bit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_control_bits_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "characteristics" (
  "characteristic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each characteristic */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the characteristic belongs to */,
  "characteristic_name" TEXT /* Name of the characteristic (e.g., voltage, current, resistance) */,
  "characteristic_value" REAL /* Value of the characteristic */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the characteristic value */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date when the characteristic was measured */,
  "tested_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who tested and recorded the characteristic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("characteristic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_characteristics_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_characteristics_tested_by FOREIGN KEY ("tested_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_control_bits" (
  "component_control_bit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component-control bit relationship */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component */,
  "control_bit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the control bit */,
  "test_condition" TEXT /* Description of the test conditions under which the control bit was applied */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_control_bit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_control_bits_control_bit_id FOREIGN KEY ("control_bit_id") REFERENCES control_bits ("control_bit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_control_bits_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_location" TEXT /* Location of the manufacturer */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the manufacturer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, designer, QA) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: Type of the component (e.g., transistor, diode, resistor)
